title: Data-Driven (Multi-Objective) Bayesian Optimisation
text:
ESSAI 2026 Course Website
Instructor: Tinkle Chugh
Affiliation: University of Exeter, UK
Welcome to the course website. Materials will be uploaded daily.

Day 2: Gaussian Processes and Acquisition Functions
Day 3: Multi-objective Bayesian Optimisation
